title: LAWOHO 6 Packs Dinosaur Slime for Kids - Clear, Butter, Cloud Slime Making Kit with Glow in The Dark Add-ins, 360ml Blue & Green Slimes Party Favor for Girls & Boys Birthday Halloween Christmas Easter
features: 【Dinosaurs Easter Slime Kit】This amazing slime kit is perfect for Easter! It includes 3 different types of slime, with 2 bottles of each type, and each bottle contains 60ml. You'll get cloud slime, butter slime, and clear slime. Additionally, the kit includes 6 dinosaur slime charms, 6 packs of slime add - ins, and 1 pack of foam balls. Three of the charms and three add - in items glow in the dark. It's a great choice for Easter egg hunts and ready-to-use pre-filled Easter eggs

【Unique Slime Textures】Cloud slime offers a fluffy and soft texture, just like real clouds, providing a soothing sensory experience. Butter slime is super smooth and stretchy, making it satisfying to play with. Clear slime is transparent, allowing you to see all the fun add - ins inside, and it's perfect for creating a unique visual effect

【Safe and High Quality】Our blue and green slime kit is made of high - quality materials that are safe and reassuring, ensuring that children have a safe and enjoyable playtime. It's perfect as Easter egg hunt toys and party bag fillers for kids, giving parents peace of mind while their children have fun exploring the world of slime

【Fuel Creativity in Kids Minds】Playing with this slime making kit encourages children to think creatively. They can shape, mold, and construct countless unique creations using the different types of slime, stimulating their creativity and imagination. It's an excellent Easter gifts for kids that combines entertainment with educational value

【Ideal for Every Festive Occasion】Designed with an Easter dinosaur theme in mind, it's a great option for slime party favors and it's also the perfect addition to any celebration. It serves as amazing Easter basket stuffers, can be used as prefilled Easter eggs, and makes wonderful slime party bag fillers for kids at birthday parties, holiday gatherings, or other festivals throughout the year
